market_pulse.one_liner: Markets climb but rotation fears mount as AI bubble shows cracks; energy and safe havens lead.
market_pulse.sector_rotation: Rotation from AI/tech into energy, gold, defensives as 'AI bubble showing cracks' headline circulates.

held_position_review.rationale: Bullish oil news but near-term technical weakness; hold for rotation into energy.
Strong defensive demand and unusual call buying supports upside.
Yen strengthens on risk aversion; geopolitical tensions support safe haven.
Gold rallying on geopolitical risk and lower real rates; momentum strong.
Massive put flow with 2270x average volume signals smart money hedging; exit to protect capital.

opportunities.thesis: Massive put buying with 2270x average volume indicates institutional hedging for downside; AMZN may drop sharply.
opportunities.catalyst: Upcoming earnings or tech rotation sell-off.

opportunities.thesis: Unusual call buying on communication services ETF suggests sector strength.
opportunities.catalyst: Rotation out of overvalued tech into communication services.

risk_alerts.alert: Unusual AMZN put flow with 2270x vol/OI signals big money hedging; AMZN may decline sharply.
Geopolitical escalation in Ukraine could spike volatility, benefiting GLD/FXY but hurting risk assets; manage stops tightly.
VIX at 18.21 suggests complacency; a spike could trigger sharp sell-off across portfolio.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Prolonged war sustains energy and defense sector support, benefiting XLE and safe havens.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Escalation risk lifts oil prices (XLE) and safe haven demand (GLD, FXY).

geopolitical_impact.headline: Astronauts return to ISS after sheltering during air leak repair attempt
geopolitical_impact.rationale: No direct market impact on held positions or strategy.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Localized political event; negligible market impact.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Humanitarian tragedy with no immediate market implications.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Iran footballers issued US visas for World Cup, says White House
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Minor positive diplomatic gesture; not a catalyst for broad markets.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Zelenskyy: Putin choosing war by rejecting offer for in-person talks
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Reinforces prolonged conflict narrative, supporting energy and defense sectors.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Trump hails jobs surge, says Iran talks ‘going well’
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Positive but non-committal; unlikely to shift near-term portfolio dynamics.

immediate: Exit AMZN position to avoid downside risk from massive put flow.
Set trailing stop on GLD at $382 to protect gains.
